summary.content: Senior Frontend Engineer with a decade driving engineering excellence across security, finance, and energy sectors. Architected 4 production Angular applications from inception, championed TDD and quality practices across a 15–20 person team, and delivered a 12x performance improvement on critical transaction workflows. Deep expertise in Angular, TypeScript, TDD, and AI-assisted development—currently leading an internal masterclass series on AI engineering workflows.

items.description:
Promoted internally from Software Engineer. Led frontend architecture and engineering excellence initiatives across a 15–20 person team.

Technical Leadership & Architecture

  • Architected 4 Angular applications from inception—all in production—driving full-stack design decisions including BFF (Backend for Frontend) patterns and API contracts between frontend and Python/FastAPI services

  • Championed Tracer Bullet Development methodology, prioritizing CI/CD pipelines and walking skeleton architecture to ensure end-to-end integration from day one

  • Designed and implemented progressive save architecture to handle complex, large-payload transactions by decomposing operations into granular chunks triggered by user interactions—reducing wait times from 45–60 seconds to 2–5 seconds per transaction

  • Collaborated across full stack (Angular, Python/FastAPI, AWS) to establish scalable system architecture and deployment strategies

Engineering Excellence

  • Sole champion of quality practices in the team—introduced strict TDD methodology, comprehensive ESLint configurations, Git hooks, and automated quality gates in CI/CD pipelines at a time when tests were routinely cut to save budget

  • Drove adoption of coverage thresholds and behavior-driven testing approaches, raising the quality bar across the entire frontend codebase

  • Established engineering standards that became organizational best practices, with influence extending beyond the frontend team

Team Development

  • Mentored 3–6 engineers per project on clean code principles, testing strategies, and architectural decision-making

  • Launched "Amihan is Coding", a 4-part internal masterclass series on AI-assisted development for 17 engineers—covering orchestration, planning, and methodology for integrating high-reasoning AI models into real engineering workflows

  • Championed modern development practices including AI-assisted workflows (Cursor, Claude Code, ChatGPT) for accelerated prototyping and refactoring
• Contributed to Python-based actuarial calculation systems and data processing applications

Built Java-based frontend solutions across two core products at a global fintech leader.

  • Developed interfaces for a bank-to-bank transaction system and a payment portal processing SWIFT transactions between financial institutions

  • Worked on mission-critical financial infrastructure demanding high reliability, security, and regulatory compliance

Built internal tooling for smart card security systems in small teams of 3–7 using Java Eclipse RCP.

  • Contributed to smart card application management tooling supporting 3–5 card applications

  • Worked on a communication tracing tool used to log and monitor data exchange between smart cards

  • Gained hands-on expertise in cryptographic implementations, security architecture, and sensitive data handling

items.name: Engineering Standards Leadership
items.description: Sole champion of quality in a 15–20 person team—introduced TDD, coverage thresholds, ESLint standards, Git hooks, and CI/CD quality gates that became organizational best practices

items.name: Architectural Impact
items.description: Designed progressive save architecture that reduced transaction wait times from 45–60 seconds to 2–5 seconds in enterprise energy applications

items.name: Technical Depth
items.description: 10+ years spanning smart card cryptographic systems, SWIFT interbank payment infrastructure, and enterprise energy sector applications—4 production apps architected from inception
